abstract: A Boolean value that indicates whether to import browser data from files.
overview:
## Discussion

If the value of this property is `false`, the system retrieves browsing data from the other browser and provides the data to your app by invoking your handler for the [doc://BrowserKit/documentation/BrowserKit/BEBrowserDataImportManager] class’s [doc://BrowserKit/documentation/BrowserKit/BEBrowserDataImportManager/userActivityType-35jes].

If the value of this property is `true`, the system cancels the browser-to-browser data transfer, and your app imports the browsing data from disk according to your app’s unique workflow.

# importFromFiles

**Instance Property**

A Boolean value that indicates whether to import browser data from files.

## Declaration

```swift
var importFromFiles: Bool { get }
```

## Discussion

If the value of this property is `false`, the system retrieves browsing data from the other browser and provides the data to your app by invoking your handler for the [doc://BrowserKit/documentation/BrowserKit/BEBrowserDataImportManager] class’s [doc://BrowserKit/documentation/BrowserKit/BEBrowserDataImportManager/userActivityType-35jes].

If the value of this property is `true`, the system cancels the browser-to-browser data transfer, and your app imports the browsing data from disk according to your app’s unique workflow.
title: importFromFiles
